chain.thought: Explanation: Gold medals represent first-place finishes. France has 11 gold medals, which is the highest among all the listed nations.

judge_thought: Explanation: "Placed first" corresponds to gold medals. From the table, France has 11 golds, more than Greece (6), Yugoslavia (3), Spain (1), Morocco (1), Turkey (1), Egypt (0), and Tunisia (0). Therefore, France placed first the most.
